title: Will US inflation (CPI) for March be above 3.4%?
description: Traders speculate on whether the US Consumer Price Index report for March will exceed 3.4%.

title: Will the S&P 500 close above 5,500 on 30 June?
description: Settlement depends on the S&P 500’s official closing value on that date.

title: Will Bitcoin trade above $100,000 at any point in 2026?
description: The contract resolves YES if BTC/USD touches or exceeds $100k at any time before end of year.

title: Will the Labour Party win more than 330 seats in the next UK general election?
description: Outcome determined by the official results issued by the Electoral Commission.

title: Will the US Congress pass a federal data-privacy bill by year-end?
description: Settles YES if a bill becomes law before expiry.

title: Will New York record more than 2 inches of snow this January?
description: Based on official NOAA snowfall measurements for the month.

title: Will there be a named hurricane landfall in Florida during the 2026 season?
description: Requires at least one named storm making landfall, per the National Hurricane Center.

title: Will “Dune: Part 3” be officially announced by 1 October 2026?
description: YES if the studio or director confirms the film publicly via official channels.

title: Will a UK artist reach #1 on the Billboard Hot 100 before 2027?
description: Verification uses Billboard’s official weekly chart records.

title: Will Tesla deliver more than 2 million vehicles in 2026?
description: Based on Tesla’s end-of-year delivery report.

title: Will Apple release a foldable iPhone by December 2026?
description: YES if Apple publicly launches or announces a foldable iPhone model.

title: Will Manchester City win the 2025–26 Premier League season?
description: Outcome follows the Premier League’s official final table.

title: Will Nadal play at least one match at Roland Garros in 2026?
description: YES if he appears in the first-round draw and plays.

title: Will a pigeon land on the Wimbledon Centre Court roof during the 2026 men’s final?
description: Settles on publicly verifiable video evidence during the match.

title: Will the Met Office declare 25 July 2026 the hottest day of the year in the UK?
description: YES if that date is the hottest daily maximum temperature in Met Office records.

title: Will a new prime number larger than 10^30 be discovered before 2028?
description: Verified via public mathematical registries.

title: Will the London Underground experience a system-wide outage of more than one hour in November 2026?
description: Requires an official TfL report confirming a full-network disruption.

title: Will SpaceX reach orbit on its first launch attempt of 2026?
description: YES if the first 2026 launch results in a confirmed orbital insertion.

title: Who will win the 2026 FIFA World Cup?
description: Prediction on the champion of the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

title: Who will be cast as the next James Bond?
description: Speculation on the actor officially announced to lead the next 007 film.
